status: Passed (unit + host accounting + Apple kernel confirms rename and reads preserved content + Apple fsck_apfs clean). In-place file rename certified; insert+delete+rename mutation set complete.
capability: commitImageOnlyFileRename renames one root file with a true in-place copy-on-write checkpoint commit: it rebuilds the COW'd root tree with the renamed dirent + inode while the file keeps its object id and its data extent stays put (extent-ref tree unchanged). Net-zero allocation - file count, next object id, allocated-block count all unchanged. Fails closed on a missing old name or an existing new name.
code: src/core/partition_apfs_writer.cpp: commitInPlaceFileRename / buildRenameFileList / ApfsRenameRequest (reuses the signed-delta COW-chain writer with all deltas 0).
unit_test: tests/unit/test_partition_manager_core.cpp::apfsWriter_inPlaceFileRenameKeepsContentAndObjectId - renames a content file and asserts the reader reads the same content under the new name, the old name is gone, and missing/duplicate renames fail closed. 119/119 core subtests pass.

vm_external_gate.environment: qemu/KVM macOS Sequoia recovery; apfs.kext 2332.101.1; container with old.txt renamed to new.txt (xid 5) attached raw as SATA disk0
method: 1. format-image (RN) -> insert keep.txt -> insert old.txt (content) -> commit-image-file-rename old.txt new.txt. Host parse confirmed file count / next object id / alloc count and the extent-ref record all unchanged (the renamed file id 17 keeps its data block).
2. Apple kernel auto-mounted /Volumes/RN; `ls` shows keep.txt + new.txt (old.txt gone); `cat new.txt` = 'renamed file keeps content' (the renamed file's data preserved).
vm_external_gate.kernel_result: ls -> keep.txt new.txt (no old.txt); cat new.txt -> renamed file keeps content
vm_external_gate.apple_fsck_apfs: fsroot tree / extent ref tree / volume object map space / allocated space all consistent; The volume RN appears to be OK; The container /dev/disk0 appears to be OK (no warnings).
vm_external_gate.evidence_png: rn-ls.png (ls after rename) + rn-fsck.png (cat new.txt + clean fsck)

gates: clang-format + lizard (CCN<=10, params<=5) + cppcheck clean; commit 9b04113 (all pre-commit hooks passed, no bypass).
next: Crash-safety (designed), multi-leaf fstree, fragmented free space, multi-CIB, arbitrary real-Apple containers.
